description: Kompany provides business verification and KYC/KYB data services, including company information, filings, UBO discovery, monitoring, and related compliance data. Its website hosts a developer portal for integrating these services programmatically.
summary: kompany.com exposes a documented KYC/KYB HTTP API through its KYC API developer portal; public docs confirm API-key authentication, but the public pages available without sign-in do not reveal a machine-readable OpenAPI URL, exact base URL, or any GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces.
